CONFIDENTIAL — repeated page header
htmltopdf fixed footer
z2 badge
z1 underneath

Fixed positioning per page

A relatively positioned card. Its corner tag resolves against the card, not the page.
corner
fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Paragraph 1: filler so the document spans multiple pages. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Paragraph 2: filler so the document spans multiple pages. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
